steps.title: Read the bar heights from the figure
steps.content: From the bar graph, read the chess bar height and the drama bar height directly off the y-axis (in number of students). The reading shows chess at roughly $20$ students and drama at roughly $30$ students.

steps.title: Compute the difference
steps.content: Subtract chess from drama: $$30-20=10$$ So drama has $10$ more students than chess, which matches choice A.
